strengths: Shows understanding of proper suture material selection and preparation
Demonstrates knowledge of extracorporeal knot tying technique fundamentals
weaknesses: This appears to be an instructional video rather than a performance attempt
No actual task completion timing or execution can be evaluated
Unable to assess practical application of demonstrated techniques

drills.name: Mark-to-mark needle path drill
drills.description: Practice 10 passes through both target marks before any knot tying to build muscle memory for accurate placement.
drills.targets_weakness: Need to transition from theory to practical execution.

drills.name: Knot-pusher sequencing drill
drills.description: Complete 10 three-throw extracorporeal sequences with deliberate pusher advancement, focusing on consistent technique.
drills.targets_weakness: Converting instructional knowledge into timed performance.

drills.name: Slit-closure check drill
drills.description: Practice tightening just enough to close the slit without tissue damage, then visually inspect before proceeding.
drills.targets_weakness: Developing practical assessment skills during execution.

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on converting your solid theoretical understanding into consistent timed performances. Practice complete task runs to build the rhythm needed for reliable execution under time pressure.
